title: euphorbia × paradoxa
intro: Euphorbia × paradoxa, also known as the Tirunelveli cactus or the Candelabra tree, is a hybrid plant species within the Euphorbia genus, characterized by its unique tree-like appearance. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of diterpene esters and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Euphorbia × paradoxa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support wound healing, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine. In herbal preparations, Euphorbia × paradoxa is often used in the form of a paste or an infusion, which can be applied topically or consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
